title: DEKTON Large Leather Working Gloves | Ultimate Protection for DIY & Tradesmen | Ultra Grip Material | CE Cat 2 & EN388 Certified | Ideal for Protection in Various Task
features: Ultimate Protection for DIY & Tradesmen: The Dekton Large Leather Working Gloves offer superior protection, making them perfect for heavy-duty tasks in construction, automotive work, and home improvement. Designed for tradesmen and DIY enthusiasts, these gloves ensure reliable safety during demanding projects.

Ultra Grip Material for Enhanced Control: Featuring ultra grip material, these gloves provide excellent grip and control while handling tools or materials, even in wet or oily conditions. The tough leather construction offers long-lasting durability while maintaining dexterity for detailed tasks.

Durable Leather for Longevity & Comfort: Made from high-quality leather, these gloves are built for tough jobs, offering resistance to abrasions, cuts, and punctures. The ergonomic design ensures a snug fit that balances protection with comfort, allowing for extended use without discomfort.

CE Cat 2 & EN388 Certified for Safety: These gloves meet the rigorous safety standards of CE Category 2 and EN388, providing reliable defense against mechanical risks. Their strong, protective qualities make them suitable for both professional tradesmen and home DIYers seeking dependable protection.

Versatile Use for Various Applications: Whether you're working on construction sites, handling machinery, or completing DIY projects, Dekton Leather Working Gloves offer the flexibility and safety needed for a wide range of applications. Ideal for tasks requiring extra grip and protection.
description: The Dekton Large Leather Working Gloves provide ultimate protection for tradesmen and DIY enthusiasts alike. Made from durable, high-quality leather, these gloves offer excellent resistance to abrasions, cuts, and punctures, ensuring safety in tough environments. The ultra grip material enhances control when handling tools and materials, even in wet or slippery conditions, making them ideal for construction, automotive work, and home improvement tasks. Designed for comfort and functionality, these gloves feature an ergonomic fit that allows for full dexterity without sacrificing protection. Certified to CE Category 2 and compliant with EN388 standards, they provide reliable protection against mechanical risks, offering peace of mind during demanding tasks. Whether you're on the job site or tackling a home project, the Dekton Leather Working Gloves are your go-to for superior grip, durability, and comfort. Ideal for a wide range of applications, from heavy-duty professional work to everyday DIY projects.
